about.summary: Robotics and AI Engineer with deep expertise in robotic systems design, ROS/ROS2, and autonomous systems. Extensive hands-on experience with collaborative robots, UAVs, and computer vision applications. Passionate about developing cutting-edge solutions for complex robotics challenges, from autonomous UAV landing systems to industrial control systems.
about.description: I specialize in research and implementation of state-of-the-art robotics technologies including path planning, localization, control systems, and computer vision. My experience spans from academic research to industrial applications, working with leading robotics platforms and managing cross-functional teams to deliver innovative solutions.

projects.title: Autonomous UAV Landing System
projects.description: Developed and validated precision landing technology for UAVs on moving platforms with centimeter-level accuracy.
projects.details: Complete system design including localization techniques (UWB and custom Kalman Filters), control algorithms, and state machines for autonomous chase and landing phases. Achieved real-world validation with custom UAV and rover platforms.

projects.title: GM Engine Control Systems
projects.description: Developed control and diagnostic systems for General Motors vehicles with deployment on 100,000+ vehicles.
projects.details: Defined specifications and implemented engine control systems for GMC Sierra and Chevrolet Silverado (2024-2027 models). Improved diagnostic systems using machine learning algorithms for fault estimation and Six Sigma analysis, resulting in €8M+ cost savings.

projects.title: AI Concept Map Generator
projects.description: NLP software that automatically generates concept maps from text, winning first place at Challenge@Polito AI competition.
projects.details: Developed an innovative NLP application that analyzes text and creates visual concept maps. The project contributed to an AI startup that raised over €3M+ in investments.

projects.title: Agricultural Robotics Platform
projects.description: Affordable hardware platform for human demonstration acquisition in agricultural applications.
projects.details: Research project focused on developing cost-effective robotics solutions for agricultural automation, with emphasis on human-robot interaction and demonstration learning.
